message.thinking:
We need to answer each question with JSON array of 3 objects. Each object has question field as one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" depending on question. Provide feedback: highlight problems or strengths. Provide boolean complies: true if meets requirement. Evaluate text.

Let's examine.

1. Chapters: Does the text list main sections of thesis? The provided text contains subheadings like "Problēmas nostādne:" and "Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums". But it doesn't list all main sections. Usually, an introduction may list chapters. Not here. So fails. So compliance false. Feedback: doesn't list main sections; only two headings.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It does give descriptions of those headings. But since it doesn't list all sections, maybe not fully. But description of the two sections present. The question: "Does the text briefly describe contents of each section." It's limited; but could be considered partially. But since not all sections, compliance false. Feedback: provides some description but not of all sections.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is general structure just from this text? It's unclear; only two parts. So no. Compliance false. Feedback: text doesn't provide clear overall structure; missing table of contents.

Thus all false.

Provide JSON array.
